notes:
The game crashes on loading screens about every hour or so. Not an issue due to frequent save points (just remember to save) and I managed to complete and enjoy the game regardless. Performance is very good.
I suspect disabling Esync would fix the issue but I haven't tested because I found out too late.

notes: ultrawide 3440x1440 rock solid 60fps (note: game runs 30fps during cutscenes). logitech F710 gamepad works perfectly. note: resolutions above 2560x1440 are not officially supported, however the fix is simply replacing main.dll with one downloaded from www.wsgf.org (this shortcoming has no impact on the Platinum rating)

title: OKAMI HD / 大神 絶景版

notes:
The game runs, and is playable. However, I experienced major slowdown on the fan menu. Lowering the resolution of the game did not affect this. I did not try any wine tweaks.

For me (because of controller issues), the choice was between playing it in 4k with this issue or in 1080p without (on windows). I found the second option preferable.
title: OKAMI HD / 大神 絶景版

notes:
Game ran near-perfectly. I had to play on 480p, but that's because of my system. I did experience two issues, but I don't know for a fact that they were attributable to Proton:

1) The game froze twice (not far apart in time, but not at the same spot) on the loading screen. FWIW I moved the laptop slightly off the table so the bottom fan emptied into the air, and it didn't happen again. Maybe/probably just a coincidence.
2) If the game is left unattended and ubuntu locks the screen, the game will be frozen upon unlocking the system. I don't know whether or not this is the case on windows, as windows never locked in the first place when playing this game.

Oddly enough, I didn't have the fan menu slowdown issue I experienced when playing on my much more powerful desktop. Maybe cause of different drivers or something, idk.
title: OKAMI HD / 大神 絶景版

notes: With proton 4.11-3 and default settings played perfectly without encountering any issues at all (played over 3 hours), all previous hang issues seem to be fixed
title: OKAMI HD / 大神 絶景版

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 with Max-Q Design
notes: I played this game across a number of proton versions. Disabling esync -did- seem to remove the crashes on earlier versions, but on current proton it appears the crashes are likely fixed without needing to do that. The crashes are literally the only issue I had across 50 hours of playtime. Far as I can tell, the game is now a pure platinum.
title: OKAMI HD / 大神 絶景版
